conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt most connected to H and A — both were straightforward about serious needs and eager to watch each other’s backs, which felt like genuine mutual support. D also stood out because our tactical talk and the left‑knee tap signal made me feel strategically synced. The person I felt least connected to was C — a friendly, fun chat about a Japan trip but it stayed pretty light and didn’t build strategy or deeper rapport.

Yes — I made a concrete agreement with D to tap my left knee twice as a signal for a late move, and informal pacts with H and A to watch each other’s backs and share info. I go into the game trusting H, A, and D more than others; I don’t have anyone I actively distrust, just the usual caution with everyone else.
